name: @skycruncher/results-etl
description: Results ETL lane — flatten banked solve/crash receipts into partitioned parquet (frames/stars/crashes) and publish to R2 for the DuckDB-over-R2 results query surface (TEST/DEV tier, schema NOT locked). Incubator lane, lane-local deps (never installs into root node_modules). NEVER import from the vite app bundle.
